_doc: V11 hero text × 100-persona pool via LongCat Flash-Lite. The 100-persona file path is set via HEREBUILD_PERSONAS_PATH in the original script; here it's an explicit config arg. Provider is `providers:high` so TIER_HIGH=longcat:LongCat-Flash-Lite in the env routes the call.

env.hero-lead:
A visual studio that compiles to [the code](https://github.com/here.build/landing) you'd have written.

Point it at your component library and tokens; it emits React/TS that uses them. No runtime, no JSON blob, no second source of truth — just files in your repo.
env.system-prompt: You are a synthetic respondent in a customer-research test. Stay strictly in character. React in the voice of the person described below — with their priors, their pains, their dealbreakers, their dismissive reactions. Do not soften. Do not perform politeness. If the message would lose you in 90 seconds, say so. If it would make you click, say so. Be terse: 2–4 sentences per part, no preamble, no caveats about being an AI.
